description: Overall, Dynamics 365 is a powerful solution for business that need an all in one platform for managing operations and customer services.
author: Junaid E.
pros: Integration with Microsoft own products like Outlook, Teams and Power BI is seamless and boosts productivity.
cons: The platform can be overwhelming to setup and configure due to its complexity. Licensing costs add up quickly, especially if you need multiple modules. performance can sometimes lags if not optimized correctly.

description: Overall our team completely enjoyed the program. We would still be using it if the costs were cheaper. The data from quotes emails are stored so you can access information quickly and easy anywhere.
author: Bill L.
pros: Helps keep us aligned as a team on the go while working remote. Allows for customer data to be securely shared.
cons: Costs are rather high conpated to past services such as sakesforce and arlo. We switched mainly due to costs.
author_profession: Vice President of Sales and Operations

description: It has everything... From printing checks, invoicing, Sales quotes and marketing. Everything you need to power your business is at your fingertips.
author: Breanna C.
pros: Business Central is one of the many key components and functions that is very easy to use with the support of Copilot! Made printing checks a breeze!
cons: Nothing! its has so many essential tools and makes working remotely so much easier! Its the perfect app to streamline your business

description: Our experience has been mixed, mostly due to poor implementation partners. While I believe in the power of the software and its capabilities, it does not seem like it is an industry-leading CRM at this point. However, I'm hopeful that it will get to that point with further investment from Microsoft.
author: Christian D.
pros: The platform is very robust with different modules and infinite capabilities, from sales to service management to marketing, to HR. I appreciate Microsoft's commitment to improvement in technology by integrating things like Teams and Copilot into our CRM workflow.
cons: Microsoft makes you work with costly implementation partners to set up your system. The system also does not integrate naturally with Business Central on the accounting side. Make updates to the system can also take some time to learn through the advanced settings.

review_title: Strong Capabilities, but Reliability Needs Improvement
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I liked most about Dynamics 365 is how easy and natural it feels to use in day-to-day work. The campaign management features are very effective, especially for marketing events where it’s simple to track who subscribed, who attended, and understand the overall turnaround, giving teams clear visibility without extra effort. For salespeople, it removes a lot of the usual admin - meetings are quick to log, and the Microsoft 365 integration makes a real difference, allowing calls to be made directly from the platform while automatically capturing and recording meetings. It streamlines processes, saves time, and helps everyone stay organised without feeling overly complicated.
cons: it can sometimes feel unreliable due to frequent bugs, which can interrupt workflows and slow things down. The search function, in particular, doesn’t always work as expected, making it frustrating when you’re trying to quickly find contacts or information. Another limitation is the lack of functionality to clearly distinguish between a quick “hi/hello” phone call and a more meaningful business conversation - both tend to be logged in the same way, which can be misleading when reviewing client engagement.

description: Great experience using Dynamics 365! Overall, we are very happy using Dynamics 365 as there are a lot of different integrations for us.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Microsoft dynamics allows us to keep all of our information and tracking of users, and products into one place. There is seamless integration across users.
cons: The integration across users is not super reliable. We experience a lot of lag and downtime between users.

description: Overall it was a great product to keep track of my database and set reminders to follow up with prospects.
author: Stephanie C.
pros: This is the CRM used by my last job. I enjoyed the ease of use and figuring it out, in order to manage my day to day activity in the job.
cons: It did not track emails. You had to integrate with another software to track emails and activity with customers.

description: Great product to be honest, many different modules. But very good user interface but can be costly for implementation.
author: Ray W.
pros: Great product but can get expensive for the implementation. But would still recommend for your company as a erp system
cons: The cost is quite a bit for implementation so please keep that in mind and budget for it so there wont be any surprises

review_title: Good Tool for big team working together!
description: It was a positive experience as a lot of people can work simultaneously on the same views, collaborate and share inquries.
author: Mansi G.
pros: Easy to navigate and manage several view screens.You can assign inquiries from yourself to the team members.
cons: Sometimes when you are clicking among multiple screens your filter screen goes away, and you have to reapply your search or filter

description: The overall experience is powerful, integrated, and scalable — but requiring planning, training, and investment to fully realize its value.
author: Preet B.
pros: Dynamics 365 works with the rest of the Microsoft ecosystem — for example Outlook, Teams, Excel, Azure, Power BI, Power Apps and Power Automate.
cons: It require significant training. Sometimes too many clicks to complete tasks and Navigation isn’t always intuitive

description: Using Dynamics 365 in our company at all levels P2P, R2R, Finance Module, Production Module, Quality Check
author: Nikhil K.
pros: Integrated all departments in one place, Finance, Purchase, Sale and Warehouse
cons: Manual over-writing with code functionality

review_title: Dynamics-a powerful database for contact and opportunity management
description: I have been using it daily since 2016 for sales prospecting, contact management, follow up management, opportunity tracking, account management. It also is the database of record for our prospect contact and email database, and also our client database. We have also customized Dynamics to track our clients annual software maintenance renewals.
author: Rick R.
pros: Some improvements made in 2023 have made Dynamics much better than it was before for setting up screen views, arranging and filtering columns, and improved search options.
cons: 1) The cost of marketing is very high compared to other email marketing services reporting can be complex, for example including fields from the associated account file is difficult or impossible when modifying the contact record search.

description: Overall, Microsoft 365 is super functional and letting me be creative at work. My team didnt know that thr main tools were using is base from this which is similar to my previous company which gives me an edge.
author: Allan Del Cris T.
pros: At first, I didn't know the apps I've been using for more than 2 years was created from this apps but now that I know, It is an absolute wow! Been using an ATS type tools for more than 3 years and those tools created from this tools are super easy to use and be creative.
cons: Nothing, Nonr that I can think of for over 3 years of using Merlin and Pulse as a back end of stools for customer or client engagement purposes.

description: Dynamics 365 enables the efficient processing and management of often highly customized B2B procurement processes. Furthermore, new sales projects can be activated extremely quickly in our environment. Finally, the system is highly scalable in terms of the data volumes and traffic to be managed.
author: Sergio S.
pros: This platform offers good solutions for multi-country and multi-language requirements and above all, appears to be highly scalable and performance oriented. Operational support is well positioned and responsive. I'm impressed by the solution's combination of cutting-edge technology, high performance and scalability. The fast loading times and robust architecture guarantee a seamless experience even with complex B2B requirements.
cons: Although the backend takes the extensive possibilities into account, it is currently not really self-explanatory and at first glance, somewhat brittle in its operation.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: About its simple configuration, easy to build and strong security.
cons: Sometimes, it is really slow and sometimes networks are getting disconnected.

author: Nilisha R.
pros: Very easy to use. More functionality. Dynamics 365 put everything together under same umbrella and very much customizable and manageable.
cons: Comparing it with other software, Microsoft is pretty good. However the cost is pretty high resulting to low adaptation among all staff.

description: My overall experience has been great, updates happen often to make sure the program runs smoothly and fast.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: As a cloud based solution, I enjoy how you are able to organize and manage different business and customer relations.
cons: It’s hard to say what I least like just due to me first being introduced to it at work, but it’s hard to say because it’s a great software.

review_title: Dynamics 365 Sales Is a Strong Performer
description: Been using since 2009 and find it essential in helping us run our business, manage customers, lead, and for marketing purposes.
author: David L.
pros: Easy to customize software to add new fields and even new entities. Ability to integrate with other software applications including Microsoft Outlook.
cons: Getting some of the email integration to work can take some work but is doable. Email is important for getting historical record of communications with customers, leads, etc.

review_title: So many possibility - both a pro and con
description: We have a CRM software that utilizes Microsoft Dynamics as a part of the whole picture for the clients.
author: Arielle L.
pros: There’s a lot of potential with data, particularly for CRM, sales, software and marketing.
cons: Because the possibilities are endless, it takes a while to really be able to take advantage of it at a company wide level.

description: I would give it a 10 out of 10 every single time for affordability and ease of use and would recommend it to everyone for their workplace.
author: Adriana Z.
pros: I've loved the low-cost options and real time data that I am able to update day to day as I need it!!
cons: I have not had a bad experience with dynamics 365 even after 4 years of using it for both remote and in clinic work.

review_title: Great for large companies with locations across the SU or World
description: L*ove that i could work on this with other teams in many different locations across the US.
author: Delicia T.
pros: Love the fact i could create share and view documents from other employees in different states or remote workers.
cons: Sometimes challenging when 2 or more people are working to make changes to the same document or PowerPoint and getting it to look right.

author: melissa L.
pros: Its a great value for your money, alot of neet features, not very many bugs pr issues. Simple to use.
cons: The cost is a bit high and it can be diffucult to use depending on what you need it for.It also depends on microsoft can be a bit challenging
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Copilot gives a real boost to D365
description: Great tool, functional and user-friendly, now even more powerful with Copilot and the dedicated D365 Copilot.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The advent of Copilot makes data stored in D365 a real treasure trove - even for non-coders. Any user can experiment with meaningful AI use cases.
cons: Sometimes it just freezes and you might need to start your task anew. Nothing else really to complain about.
author_profession: Global Solution Architect, Accounting and Tax

review_title: How Dynamics 365 affected a burgeoning education management company
description: Our company has used Dynamics 365 in working with clients and to grow the customer base of the business. In particular, our company's administration has had different dialog experiences with Dynamics 365.
author: Mark H.
pros: Dynamics 365 has several advanced features for a unique experience for businesses of different types and services.
cons: There is some complexities to Dynamics 365 that take a lot of time to get adjusted to and there isn't a strong tutorial option to learn them.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: great experience over all. the best tool for professionals
author: rachid R.
pros: Dynamics 365 has a lot of great features, but one of the standout aspects is its integration capabilities. It seamlessly connects with other Microsoft products like Office 365, Azure, and Power BI, which makes it a powerful tool for enhancing productivity and collaboration.
cons: One of the challenges with Dynamics 365 can be its complexity, especially for new users. The extensive range of features and customization options can be overwhelming and may require a steep learning curve. Additionally, the cost can be a concern for smaller businesses, as the pricing can add up depending on the modules and add-ons you choose.
